title: Differentiation of Human Induced Pluripotent Stem Cells
author: Elena Coccia
materials: After day 10, switch to post-patterning maturation media.

steps.title: Dissociate hiPSCs using Accutase and plate...
steps.instruction: Dissociate hiPSCs using Accutase and plate them at 400,000 cells / cm 2 on Geltrex-coated plates.

steps.title: Thaw a vial of hiPSCs and...
steps.instruction: Thaw a vial of hiPSCs and resuspend in 10 mL of culture medium.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL of Accutase and incubate at 37°C for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Neutralize with 10 mL of culture...
steps.instruction: Neutralize with 10 mL of culture medium and centrifuge again at 160 g for 3 minutes.

steps.title: Resuspend in 5 mL of culture...
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 5 mL of culture medium and plate on Geltrex-coated plates.
1. Add 10 µM Y-27632 to the culture medium and incubate for 24 hours.

steps.title: Induce differentiation by changing the media...
steps.instruction: Induce differentiation by changing the media composition and adding specific growth factors.

steps.title: 1. Prepare base media
steps.instruction: 1. Prepare base media: Combine 500 mL Neurobasal medium, 5 mL Glutamax, 5 mL B27, and 5 mL N2 supplement. 2. Supplement with 250 nM LDN193189, 10 µM SB431542, 1 µM SAG, and CHIR at specified concentrations:0.7µM day 0-3, 7.5µM day 4-9, 3µM day 10-11.

steps.title: Continue to change the media every...
steps.instruction: Continue to change the media every 2 days, adjusting CHIR concentrations as specified.

steps.title: 1. Prepare maturation media
steps.instruction: 1. Prepare maturation media: Combine base media with 20 ng/mL GDNF, 20 ng/mL BDNF, 0.2 mM ascorbic acid, 0.1 mM dibutyryl cAMP, and 1 ng/mL TGF-β3.
1. Change to maturation media starting on day 10 and continue for 4 weeks.
